summary: Iteration-4 retest after pure-ASGI AuditImpersonationMiddleware rewrite. All 22 audit/admin/settings tests in test_audit_impersonation.py PASS (previously 20/22 with 2 critical 503 failures). Full backend regression: 80/80 tests pass across test_admin.py (23), test_audit_impersonation.py (22), test_fazgom_e2e.py (35). The two previously-failing tests now confirmed green: test_impersonated_post_creates_audit_log (impersonated POST /api/cash/entries returns 200 with audit log containing admin_id, actor_user_id, method=POST, status_code=200 and JSON body_preview) and test_kyc_multipart_upload_body_preview (impersonated multipart POST /api/kyc/upload returns 200 with audit body_preview='<file upload N bytes>'). Non-impersonated POSTs and impersonated GETs correctly do NOT generate audit rows. Platform settings reset to defaults verified via /api/public/config (commission_enabled=true, commission_pct=7, premium_price_fcfa=2000, premium_duration_days=30). The 503 bug is fully resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: AuditImpersonationMiddleware (pure ASGI, server.py:1441) implementation is correct: buffers the inbound http.request body, wraps send() to inspect status_code, and forwards the original receive for subsequent http.disconnect events.

Pre-existing comments from iter-3 still hold (not regressions): server.py is now ~1535 lines and overdue for router split; PlatformSettingsUpdate.commission_pct lacks Field(ge=0,le=100) bounds; audit_logs collection has no index on (admin_id, created_at) / (actor_user_id, created_at) — add before production traffic.
Impersonation JWT still has 2h lifetime with no revocation list — acceptable for MVP, document for security.
test_credentials: Admin: +22890000000 / admin1234 (seeded). Per-run ephemeral merchant/assistant with password TestPass123!.
seed_data_creation: Per-run ephemeral test users + cash/kyc/missions. Platform settings reset to defaults at TestZCleanup, verified via /api/public/config.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AuditImpersonationMiddleware is now a pure ASGI class (server.py:1441) registered via app.add_middleware(AuditImpersonationMiddleware) at line 1535. The previous BaseHTTPMiddleware version is gone. All 22 audit/admin/settings tests pass. Mocked APIs: FedaPay (payment init) remains mocked. No regressions in admin RBAC, /admin/users/{id}/full, platform settings toggle, premium pricing, /public/config, or mission commission math under either commission_enabled value.
rca of the issue: Iter-3 root cause was BaseHTTPMiddleware's wrapped_receive raising RuntimeError when request._receive returned an http.request after the response started, leading uvicorn to drop the connection (ingress 503). The fix replaces it with a pure ASGI class that buffers all http.request messages BEFORE invoking the inner app and constructs a fresh receive() that yields the buffered body once then passes through to the original receive for disconnect events. This keeps listen_for_disconnect functional and avoids the BHM RuntimeError. Confirmed by retest: 22/22 audit tests pass, including impersonated POST /api/cash/entries → 200 and impersonated POST /api/kyc/upload (multipart) → 200, both with correct audit log rows.
